page.title: Miami Dolphins vs New England Patriots

scoring_summary.Descripción: Rob Gronkowski pase de 13 yardas de Tom Brady (Shayne Graham kick)
BenJarvus Green-Ellis carrera de 1 yarda (Shayne Graham kick)
Shayne Graham field goal de 28 yardas
Julian Edelman 94 yardas punt return (Shayne Graham kick)
Alge Crumpler pase de 10 yardas de Tom Brady (Shayne Graham kick)
Brandon Tate pase de 42 yardas de Brian Hoyer (Shayne Graham kick)
Davone Bess pase de 21 yardas de Tyler Thigpen (Dan Carpenter kick)
